basePrompt: Create a professional advertising creative image for EGYM Wellpass, a corporate wellness benefit that gives employees access to 9,000+ gyms and studios. The ad should be visually striking, modern, and ready for social media

choices.label: Young professionals
choices.promptFragment: targeting young urban professionals aged 25-34 in a modern city setting

choices.label: Fitness enthusiasts
choices.promptFragment: targeting fitness enthusiasts who love diverse workouts like yoga, weights, and swimming

choices.label: HR Directors
choices.promptFragment: targeting HR Directors and people leaders at enterprise companies

choices.label: Energetic & motivating
choices.promptFragment: with an energetic, high-energy, motivating tone using vibrant colors and dynamic composition

choices.label: Calm & mindful
choices.promptFragment: with a calm, mindful, zen-like tone using soft colors and serene composition

choices.label: Professional & data-driven
choices.promptFragment: with a professional, corporate tone using clean lines, subtle colors, and trust-building elements

questions.text: What should the visual focus on?

choices.label: Person exercising
choices.promptFragment: showing a happy person actively exercising in a bright, modern gym environment

choices.label: Lifestyle moment
choices.promptFragment: showing a lifestyle moment of someone transitioning from work to wellness, feeling refreshed

choices.label: Group activity
choices.promptFragment: showing a diverse group of people enjoying a fitness class together

choices.label: Your company pays!
choices.promptFragment: with text overlay: 'Want to work out? Your company pays!' emphasizing the free employee benefit

choices.label: 9,000+ gyms
choices.promptFragment: with text overlay: '9,000+ gyms & studios' emphasizing the massive variety and choice

choices.label: Work-life balance
choices.promptFragment: with text overlay: 'Refresh after work' emphasizing stress relief and work-life balance

choices.label: Download the App
choices.promptFragment: with a clear 'Download Now' call to action button in the design

choices.label: Learn More
choices.promptFragment: with a subtle 'Learn More' call to action, keeping the focus on the visual

choices.label: Start Free Trial
choices.promptFragment: with a prominent 'Start Your Free Trial' call to action button
